violations.text: Fried potatoes and fried shrimp were observed held at 118 degrees Fahrenheit. Food was observed stored above hot holding unit well. PIC informed to cease practice. Foods were reheated during time of inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

Pan dulces packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2026
Handwashing sinks were lacking notification signage. State guidance provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

1. Raw shells eggs were observed stored above cooked meats in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. 2. Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination (raw chicken over raw beef and pork). Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

Tamales were observed held at 120 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were observed above fill line during time of inspection. Foods were assessed and reheated during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025
The ceiling in the basement area has an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
The sealant at 3 bay sink splash board was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
